hero.tagline: Built in Rust. Forged in Adventure.
hero.description: Xindeler is an open-source MMORPG built in Rust, originally forked from Veloren and evolving into its own persistent online world focused on exploration, combat, crafting and magic.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Adventure awaits across every facet of Xindeler's ever-growing world.

exploration.title: Exploration
exploration.desc: Discover vast landscapes, ancient ruins and hidden secrets across an ever-expanding world.

combat.title: Combat
combat.desc: Master melee, ranged weapons and powerful abilities in fluid real-time battle.

crafting.title: Crafting
crafting.desc: Gather resources and create equipment, tools and consumables to survive and thrive.

magic.title: Magic
magic.desc: Harness arcane forces, master spells and shape the battlefield with mystical powers.

livingWorld.title: Living World
livingWorld.desc: Experience a world that evolves through player actions, economies and political changes.

aiNpcs.title: AI NPCs
aiNpcs.desc: Interact with intelligent NPCs capable of dynamic conversations, opinions and behavior.

showcase.title: World Showcase
showcase.subtitle: A living world of breathtaking landscapes, ancient ruins and hidden wonders. Click any scene to explore.

mistyMountains.name: Misty Mountains
mistyMountains.desc: Snow-capped peaks stretch to the horizon

willowdale.name: Village of Willowdale
willowdale.desc: A peaceful trading settlement at dusk

stonehaven.name: Stonehaven Castle
stonehaven.desc: Ancient seat of power and intrigue

darkfire.name: Darkfire Dungeon
darkfire.desc: Ancient evil stirs in the deep places

arcane.name: Arcane Sanctum
arcane.desc: Source of all magical energy in the realm

guild.name: Adventurers' Guild
guild.desc: Where heroes gather and legends are born

vision.title: The MMORPG
vision.desc1: Xindeler is more than a game — it is a persistent world where every player leaves a mark. We are building the foundations of a universe that breathes, reacts, and evolves through collective action.
vision.desc2: Our goal is to create a space where emergent stories replace scripted quests, where economies have weight, and where AI-powered inhabitants make every corner of the world feel alive.

persistentWorld.title: Persistent World
persistentWorld.desc: A living world that endures across sessions — your actions shape history.

dynamicEconomy.title: Dynamic Economy
dynamicEconomy.desc: Player-driven markets where supply, demand and scarcity drive real trade.

playerCommunities.title: Player Communities
playerCommunities.desc: Guilds, alliances and factions that form the backbone of civilization.

aiStorytelling.title: AI-driven Storytelling
aiStorytelling.desc: Emergent narratives woven from player choices and NPC motivations.

emergentGameplay.title: Emergent Gameplay
emergentGameplay.desc: Unexpected stories arise from the interplay of systems and inhabitants.

magicSystem.title: Magic System
magicSystem.desc: Deep, customizable arcane arts with schools of magic and spell crafting.

factionWarfare.title: Faction Warfare
factionWarfare.desc: Dynamic political landscape where power shifts through conflict and diplomacy.

aiWorld.title: A Living World
aiWorld.subtitle: The people of Xindeler are more than scripted NPCs. They think, remember, form opinions and react to the world around them.
aiWorld.disclaimer: AI NPC features are part of our Phase 7 roadmap. We are building the foundation to make every inhabitant of Xindeler feel truly alive.

dynamicConversations.title: Dynamic Conversations
dynamicConversations.desc: NPCs engage in meaningful dialogue rather than repeating predefined lines.

persistentMemory.title: Persistent Memory
persistentMemory.desc: Characters remember events, relationships and player interactions over time.

dynamicQuests.title: Dynamic Quests
dynamicQuests.desc: NPCs generate context-sensitive quests based on their needs and circumstances.

socialRelationships.title: Social Relationships
socialRelationships.desc: NPCs maintain friendships, rivalries, families and complex social bonds.

livingSettlements.title: Living Settlements
livingSettlements.desc: Villages and cities evolve according to events, economy and player influence.

emergentStories.title: Emergent Stories
emergentStories.desc: Unique stories arise naturally from interactions between players, NPCs and the world.

npc.memory1: Player helped gather moonleaf herbs — 21 days ago
npc.memory2: Daughter Lira has fallen gravely ill — 3 days ago
npc.memory3: Moonblossom flower grows in northern Frostpine Woods
npc.questText: "Gather 5 Moonblossom Flowers from Frostpine Woods to help heal Lira."

dialogue.playerMsg: "Elara, do you know of any rare herbs in the north?"
dialogue.npcMsg: "The Moonblossom grows in Frostpine Woods... I know this because my daughter is gravely ill and needs it."

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: The path from open-source fork to a fully persistent MMORPG world.

phase1.title: Foundation & Web Infrastructure
phase1.desc: Establishment of Xindeler's identity, web server infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline and online presence.

phase2.title: Docs, Wiki & Authentication
phase2.desc: Technical documentation portal, game wiki and authentication service for the game client.

phase3.title: Engine & Game CI/CD
phase3.desc: Engine improvements, build automation and release pipeline for client and server.

phase4.title: Magic System
phase4.desc: A deep magic framework with magical sources, spell schools and arcane progression.

phase5.title: Item System
phase5.desc: Loot, advanced crafting and inventory — the foundation of the game's economy and progression.

phase6.title: World AI Framework
phase6.desc: ORACLE: the autonomous Game Master that generates events, emergent narrative and controls the global world state.

phase7.title: AI NPC Framework
phase7.desc: AURORA: NPCs with persistent memory, social relationships, dynamic economy and contextual behavior.

phase8.title: Dynamic Quests
phase8.desc: Procedural quest generation driven by world state and NPC needs.

phase9.title: Persistent MMORPG World
phase9.desc: Launch of the persistent online world with full multiplayer, economy, factions and a living, evolving universe.

githubStats.title: Built by the Community
githubStats.contributeDesc: The project is open to collaborators. Tell us what interests you and we'll get in touch.

contribute.name: Name
contribute.skillsPlaceholder: e.g. Rust programming, 3D design, narrative writing, testing...
contribute.successDesc: We received your message. Given our limited availability, we'll get back to you within one month.
contribute.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a few minutes.
contribute.errorRate: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

community.title: Join the Community
community.subtitle: Xindeler is built by the community, for the community. Every contribution makes the world richer.

github.title: GitHub
github.desc: Browse the source code, submit issues and contribute to the project.

discord.title: Discord
discord.desc: Join the community, ask questions and meet fellow adventurers.

wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.desc: Explore lore, guides and community knowledge in the Xindeler Wiki.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Technical documentation for players, contributors and server operators.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.desc: Get the latest build of Xindeler for your operating system.

download.title: Join the Adventure
download.description: Xindeler is free and open-source. Download the client and start exploring a world that grows with every adventurer who joins.
download.launcherNote: Launcher support with auto-updates is coming soon.

items.q: When will the alpha be available?
items.a: We are in active development. Join the waitlist to be among the first to know when we open early access.
Yes, Xindeler will be free-to-play. Our commitment is that the base game will always be accessible at no cost.
Windows, Linux and macOS from launch. The game is built in Rust, which enables native cross-platform support.
Xindeler started as a fork of Veloren but has evolved with its own identity, lore, game systems and artistic direction.
The code is open source on GitHub. You can open issues, submit pull requests, or join the community on Discord to participate in game design discussions.

footer.desc: An open-source MMORPG built in Rust. Explore, craft, fight and shape a living world alongside thousands of adventurers.
